commentaries.author: Ephrem The Syrian
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Get you from here, and turn eastward, and hide yourself by the brook Cherith, that is east of the Jordan. From the typological point of view this symbol has two meanings. The stream [wadi] of Elijah prefigures that, at the fullness of time, the Messiah will come and will send the sinners to the stream that comes out of the sanctuary, just like the one that Ezekiel saw. That is the stream that gives healing to the sick when its waters are applied. The [second meaning is that] the stream is the baptism of the Messiah.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Carith, between Samaria and the Jordan. It was a torrent or valley. (Calmet)
